lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior is heavily worn. The vehicle has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or chips, and the interior is pristine, showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history. This car is essentially brand new and ready for its next owner.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches, and the interior shows light wear. All mechanical systems are functional and have been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial investment to return to a reliable or aesthetically pleasing state. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a significant oil leak and the transmission shifts roughly. The exterior shows its age with extensive rust along the wheel wells, several deep scratches, and a large dent on the rear passenger door. The paint has faded significantly on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the seats and a persistent musty odor. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source of parts.

Get ready to experience perfection! This stunning vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior. If you're looking for a top-tier ride that feels brand new, this is the one for you!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. Every component has been subjected to a rigorous assessment to ensure it meets our professional standards for quality and roadworthiness. We invite serious inquiries regarding this distinguished addition to our inventory.

Hey there! 🚗 Looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This beauty is in great shape and has been such a joy to drive! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it perfect for your daily commute or those fun weekend road trips. I’m looking for a quick sale, so I've priced it to move. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox to a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement—a critical preventative measure—and features a refreshed suspension geometry with polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers for precise turn-in. While the aesthetic reflects its use as a spirited grand tourer, the mechanical vitals remain stout, including a recently serviced cooling system and valve adjustment. This is an mechanically sound, analog machine ready for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. Finished in a timeless metallic silver, the exterior remains sharp with a deep luster, showing only the minor road chips and a small, professionally touched-up scratch on the rear bumper one would expect from a well-maintained daily driver. Inside, the charcoal leather upholstery is clean and free of tears, displaying a gentle patina on the driver’s seat that speaks to its comfortable history. Mechanically, this car is exceptionally reliable; it has undergone regular synthetic oil changes and recently received a fresh set of premium all-season tires and a full brake service. All cabin electronics, including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. This is a turn-key vehicle that offers a smooth, quiet ride and the peace of mind that comes with a documented service history. It is ready for its next

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and showcasing a refined aesthetic, the automobile demonstrates exceptional mechanical integrity and a sophisticated road presence. We invite you to acquire a machine that exemplifies rigorous standards of automotive excellence and enduring value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure performance standards align with our professional criteria. Offering a superior balance of reliability and value, it remains an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term durability and consistent operation.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It's been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape! It runs great and has been well-maintained, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable vehicle they can count on every day. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it drives!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sorted driver’s car featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery to the rear wheels. Significant preventive maintenance has been addressed, including subframe reinforcement and rod bearing inspection, preserving the chassis's torsional rigidity. The suspension utilizes a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup with refreshed bushings for sharp turn-in and balanced lateral grip. While it exhibits minor cosmetic wear, the car maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline, making it a prime candidate for the spirited enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and comfort. The exterior maintains a strong presence with its original paint, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery remains supple, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle, backed by a comprehensive service history that proves it’s been well-cared for. It drives straight, brakes confidently, and offers a quiet, composed ride. Recent oil change and tire rotation just completed. This is a solid, honest car ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without the need for any urgent repairs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and exceptional mechanical reliability. Representing a superior balance of performance and value, it remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate delivery. We invite the discerning buyer to secure this high-caliber selection.

This refined vehicle offers a distinguished combination of performance and reliability, having been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. Representing exceptional value within its class, the automobile features a comprehensive service history and remains in commendable condition for the sophisticated motorist. Experience the assurance of a well-preserved machine that delivers both prestige and dependable daily operation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that still looks and feels fantastic? This beauty has been so well-loved and is totally ready for its next big adventure! It runs like a dream and has been kept in great shape, so you can just hop in and go. I’ve truly enjoyed every mile in this car, and I’m sure you’re going to love it just as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46-generation M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. The engine exhibits excellent compression and benefits from a recent VANOS system overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative maintenance. Power is sent through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip differential, ensuring classic rear-drive dynamics. The chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, while the suspension has been refreshed with polyurethane bushings to sharpen turn-in response. Though showing minor aesthetic patina, the mechanical vitals are robust, with the cooling system recently overhauled to manage thermal loads during spirited driving. A balanced, mechanically sound platform for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor stone chips expected from careful highway driving. Inside, the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of tears or odors, reflecting a smoke-free history. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, this car is robust; it has a complete service history, with a recent professional inspection confirming the engine and transmission are in excellent working order. New brake pads were installed last season, and the tires provide plenty of grip for the road ahead. This is a reliable, high-quality choice for a discerning buyer looking for a turn-key driving experience.

Presenting a well-maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and consistent reliability. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the exceptional value and professional care reflected in this offering.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality and longevity, ensuring it meets the rigorous standards expected of a high-caliber pre-owned selection. Professional inspection confirms its readiness for immediate service.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, so it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Come take a look, you're going to love how it handles.

Up for sale is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and crisp throttle response via its factory individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts smoothly through all gates, paired with a robust limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring the chassis remains rigid under high lateral loads. Suspension components are tight, featuring refreshed bushings and dampers that preserve the signature M-division handling geometry. While showing minor signs of road use consistent with its age, this driver-focused example remains a potent performer on both street and circuit.
Used car in good condition. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the body panels are straight and well-aligned. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with plush, well-preserved upholstery and high-functioning electronics, including a crisp infotainment system and responsive climate control. Mechanically, the car is in strong form; the engine idles smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide confident stopping power. Recent service records are available, confirming a history of preventative maintenance. It is a solid, honest vehicle that is ready for its next owner to drive away with peace of mind.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and sophistication. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a commanding presence on the road, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist who values quality and dependable engineering.
